title: Citrusy Tortilla Smoke
description: This lazy Sunday German dish features tortillas infused with a citrusy smoke, offering a fluffy and flavorful vegetarian-friendly treat.

ingredients.name: 1 cup unsweetened shredded coconut (optional, for topping)

instructions: Slice the orange peels into thin strips.
Using a sharp knife or vegetable peeler, zest half of the lime on one side of each tortilla. You can reserve the other half for another use.
Place the sliced orange peels in a shallow baking dish. Sprinkle honey over them and top with squeezed lime juice from the reserved half. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until slightly caramelized.

While the oranges are cooking, warm the corn tortillas by placing them in the oven at about 180°C (356°F) for about 5-7 minutes or until they start to get crispy and golden brown. Keep an eye on them not to burn them.
Once done, transfer the baked orange slices onto the top of each warm tortilla. Sprinkle with shredded coconut if desired.
Serve immediately as a snack or dessert.
